ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user account authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Primary email address for the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "account_locked_until" TEXT /* Timestamp until which the account is locked due to failed login attempts */,
  "security_question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security question ID */,
  "security_answer" TEXT /* User's answer to the security question */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Primary role for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emails" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email record */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address linked to the user */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID this email belongs to */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if this email is the primary one for the user */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the email address for notifications */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the email (e.g., pdf, short) */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Status of email verification (e.g., verified, unverified) */,
  "verification_code" TEXT /* Code sent to the email for verification */,
  "verification_code_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration timestamp for the verification code */,
  "last_verification_attempt_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last verification attempt */,
  "failed_verification_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed verification attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each uploaded document */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who uploaded the document */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the document is stored */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the document (e.g., pdf, docx) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the document (e.g., reports, guides) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Document status (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the document has been accessed */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the document is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions and responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role ID assigned to the user */,
  "effective_from" TEXT /* Timestamp from when the role assignment is effective */,
  "effective_until" TEXT /* Timestamp until which the role assignment is effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the document associated with the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., document_update, account_change) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the document */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the document was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the document */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the document (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_logs_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., updated email, uploaded document) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client performing the action */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to perform the action (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action (e.g., old and new values) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
